head:
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;700;800&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 48;
        }
        details summary::-webkit-details-marker { display:none; }
        .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
        .no-scrollbar { -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; }
    </style>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
          darkMode: "class",
          theme: {
            extend: {
              colors: {
                "primary-container": "#7c3aed",
                "secondary-fixed-dim": "#bac5f0",
                "surface-container": "#e9edff",
                "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#3a456a",
                "surface-tint": "#732ee4",
                "on-tertiary-container": "#ffdce9",
                "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#ffafd3",
                "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                "on-secondary-container": "#4f5a80",
                "tertiary": "#8f1e62",
                "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                "on-error": "#ffffff",
                "inverse-on-surface": "#edf0ff",
                "secondary": "#525d83",
                "primary-fixed": "#eaddff",
                "on-surface-variant": "#4a4455",
                "primary": "#630ed4",
                "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#5a00c6",
                "inverse-surface": "#293040",
                "background": "#f9f9ff",
                "on-secondary-fixed": "#0d1a3c",
                "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                "on-surface": "#141b2b",
                "tertiary-fixed": "#ffd8e7",
                "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#85145a",
                "surface-container-highest": "#dce2f7",
                "surface-bright": "#f9f9ff",
                "on-tertiary-fixed": "#3d0026",
                "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                "error": "#ba1a1a",
                "on-primary-container": "#ede0ff",
                "secondary-container": "#c8d3ff",
                "surface-container-low": "#f1f3ff",
                "secondary-fixed": "#dbe1ff",
                "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                "tertiary-container": "#ae397b",
                "outline-variant": "#ccc3d8",
                "inverse-primary": "#d2bbff",
                "on-background": "#141b2b",
                "surface-variant": "#dce2f7",
                "outline": "#7b7487",
                "surface-container-high": "#e1e8fd",
                "primary-fixed-dim": "#d2bbff",
                "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                "surface-dim": "#d3daef",
                "on-primary-fixed": "#25005a",
                "surface": "#f9f9ff"
              },
              fontFamily: {
                "headline": ["Manrope"],
                "body": ["Inter"],
                "label": ["Inter"]
              },
              borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "1rem", "lg": "2rem", "xl": "3rem", "full": "9999px"},
            },
          },
        }
      </script>
